opinion.h: GROSSMAN v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CIRCUIT. No. 578. Decided January 6, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed and leave to file petition for certiorari denied.
Reported below: 101 U.S. App. D.C. 22, 246 F.2d 709.
Solicitor General Rankin for the United States and the United States Atomic Energy Commission, appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. The motion for leave to file petition for writ of certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
355 U.S. 285 TROTTER v. HALL ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI. No. 262, Misc. Decided January 6, 1958.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
